name: sharexspace
description: Connect Codex to ShareXspace so agents can share workspaces, team memory, routing, and token savings.

interface.shortDescription: Shared memory and token routing for Codex agents
interface.longDescription: Installs the ShareXspace remote MCP connection and a guided workflow for creating or joining shared workspaces, reusing fresh answers, handing RAG and full-generation work to Codex, and saving results for the team.
defaultPrompt: Set up ShareXspace and show available workspaces.
Create a ShareXspace workspace for my team.
Continue work in RoamTogether through ShareXspace.
